channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Thune Reaches Out to Paxton After Texas Upset
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune spoke with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton on Wednesday, opening communication after the Republican's...

item.title: Grassroots Political Advocacy Fueled the Power of the Vote in Texas
Border Win: Chinese Special Interest Aliens Caught by Texas K9
NASA chief pulls back curtain on Trump UFO files after bizarre finds surface in buried fed records
item.description: NASA administrator Jared Isaacman says declassified UAP files show real unexplained phenomena but no alien bodies or crashed ships have been found.
